title: Enterprise-scale canonical queries and Observatory performance
acceptance: Orchestration, report query, cache, index, manifest, trace reads, and Observatory normalization avoid repeated full scans and quadratic joins.
The approved 1,000-story and 10,000-record performance budgets pass on the supported platform tolerances.
Server-side Observatory caching is single-flight, revision-aware, conditional-request capable, and never weakens canonical evidence checks.
